title: Dimanic Beds
description: Vertical stackable beds with no support mods needed
body:
hi! I created the custom vertical stacking bed resourcepack which **doesn't require any mods to work** and **works with literally any other resourcepack** because don't add any new texture to the bed model. 


Bed now looks more natural compared to other blocks with complicated models and also could stack vertically.

 look how they blend in.
 ![Here, details are same level](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e42ca32a483272b9f2d0fc7ae05265a1b4012784.png)



There are two versions:
*1.21.6+ for more detailed model 
*and 1.21.4+ which requires specific amount of details or else game couldn't read it.

Tlso, you can choose between having all beds altered or just the vanilla red one.

Hope you like my project and will wait for other upcoming stuff
